text.title: Internal RFC Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this proposal already a decision?

branch.question: Will ≥2 distinct stakeholders need to comment?

conclusion.verdict: use the RFC template; set status=draft

example.trace: input matches `decision_finalized == false` → sub-question → `stakeholder_count >= 2` → conclusion ref=`status-field-required`.
